title: Software update - background DFU for Language update
scenario: Language update via background DFU completes successfully when app is sent to background during update process
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with a connected headset that has a language update available.
2. Navigate to Dev Settings and start the language update.
3. Immediately send the app to the background (e.g., press the Home button or switch to another app).
4. Wait for the DFU (Device Firmware Update) to complete in the background.
5. Bring the app back to the foreground.
6. Verify the language has been updated correctly on the headset.
expected: The DFU completes successfully in the background, and the headset language is changed correctly.
